# Mosquito Man Plus

> Mosquito Man Plus is a mosquito and tick control company based in Oshawa, Ontario, serving Durham Region and the Greater Toronto Area with residential, event, and commercial treatments. A sister brand of Bugman Plus.

## Business Information

- **Name:** Mosquito Man Plus
- **Parent company:** Bugman Plus (https://www.bugmanplus.com)
- **Founder:** Joe Barrett
- **Headquarters:** Oshawa, Ontario, Canada
- **Phone:** 905-924-2847
- **Email:** info@mosquitomanplus.com
- **Website:** https://mosquitomanplus.com

## Services

- Residential Mosquito Barrier Treatment
- Seasonal Mosquito Programs (recurring, spring-fall visits)
- One-Time Event Spraying (weddings, parties, outdoor gatherings)
- Standing Water & Breeding Site Treatment
- Larvicide Treatment
- Tick Control Add-On
- Commercial & Patio Mosquito Control

## Unique Value Propositions

- Return-visit guarantee: if mosquitoes return within 21 days of a seasonal-program treatment, Mosquito Man Plus re-treats the property at no charge.
- Uses EPA/PMRA (Health Canada Pest Management Regulatory Agency) registered products.
- Treatment timed to mosquito hatch cycles and local weather rather than a single one-off spray.
- Locally based in Oshawa with technicians familiar with Durham Region's ravines, creeks, and clay-soil drainage patterns that drive local mosquito pressure.
- Part of the Bugman Plus family of companies, an Oshawa-founded pest control group.

## Service Areas (16)

Oshawa, Whitby, Ajax, Pickering, Clarington, Bowmanville, Courtice, Newcastle, Brooklin, Port Perry, Scugog, Uxbridge, Scarborough, North York, Mississauga, Vaughan.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://mosquitomanplus.com/): Overview of Mosquito Man Plus, services, and service areas.
- [About](https://mosquitomanplus.com/about.html): Company background and founder Joe Barrett.
- [Services](https://mosquitomanplus.com/services.html): Full list of mosquito and tick control services.
- [Areas](https://mosquitomanplus.com/areas.html): Index of all 16 service-area pages.
- [Blog](https://mosquitomanplus.com/blog/): Mosquito and tick control guides for Durham Region homeowners.
- [Mosquito Control Durham Region: The Complete Guide](https://mosquitomanplus.com/blog/2026-07-17-mosquito-control-durham-region-complete-guide.html): Pillar guide covering season timing, cost factors, pet/kid safety, and DIY vs. professional treatment.
- [Contact](https://mosquitomanplus.com/contact.html): Request a quote by phone, email, or form.
